original_title: SIRO-5638 "A nursery school teacher with a lovely smile! She stars in an adult video inspired by a former adult video influencer! When the actor fingers her, she hits the camera directly and squirts out of focus! [First shoot] She's doing adult videos online...": MGS Video (Prestige Group) Adult Video Streaming Site
overview: A woman who loves children and has adorable dimples—the perfect kindergarten teacher—applied to us. Yura, a 20-year-old currently attending a women's university specializing in childcare, is worried about her lack of opportunities to meet the opposite sex. Campus life is synonymous with romance, leaving her with a truly romantic disposition. She says she applied because she admires Mikami ●a, a former AV actress who is now active as a talent and influencer. However, perhaps another motive is a sexual craving stemming from a lack of fulfillment in her real life. She seems to enjoy gentle, thorough fingering, and is particularly sensitive inside. When gently and thoroughly fingered, she delivered a spectacular squirt that hit the camera, contrary to the actor's techniques! It's not a Pokémon Water Gun, but a Hydro Pump! This doesn't reduce HP, it actually restores it! I'd love to be showered with as much squirt as I could from such a cute girl!
title: SIRO 5638
